description: A horizontal graphic on a dark green background with a faint embossed Department of Homeland Security seal on the right. A DHS seal and the words U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services appear at the top left. White text reads ALERT, with a serif headline below it reading USCIS Announces FY 2026 Inflation Increase for Certain Immigration-Related Fees.
notable_text: U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services; ALERT; USCIS Announces FY 2026 Inflation Increase for Certain Immigration-Related Fees
